name: Stickman Boxing KO Champion
description: This new boxing game is available for all stickman fans! Fight 4 professionals in intense combat. Fight using a variety of devastating punches and combos. Jab, cross, uppercut, give in all you have, but don’t forget to dodge!. Master jabs, hooks, uppercuts, body punches and combine them with devastating Special Punches.
instructions: Like in real boxing you can throw many punches uppercut jab cross and dodging Knock-out all your opponents and the victory is yours
